vehicles.slot: Cap near gear selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the cap near the gear selector base on the center console. Pry off with a key.
Insert key into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector to Neutral. Replace cap.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION: depress clutch fully and move gear lever to Neutral.
neutral: 12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally.
FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground.
IMPORTANT: Saturn has plastic body panels — do NOT hook or chain to any body panels. Use frame lift points or flatbed.
vehicles.notes: Discontinued 2007. FWD — rear lift. Unique Saturn plastic body panels — do not hook body.
vehicles.warn: Saturn plastic body panels — do NOT hook or chain to body panels.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from rear (front FWD wheels roll).
towNotes: Plastic body panels — no chains on body. Use proper lift points or flatbed.

battery.warnings: Plastic panels — no chains on body.

knownIssues.title: Saturn Plastic Body Panels
knownIssues.detail: Saturn vehicles use polymer plastic body panels. Standard tow chains or hooks on the body will crush or crack the panels. Always use proper lift points (frame/subframe) or load on flatbed with wheel straps.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
Insert key, press.
Press brake. Move to N.
Manual: clutch, N.
vehicles.notes: Honda-sourced V6 and AWD on some models. Plastic body panels.
vehicles.warn: Plastic body panels — no chains on body. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: rear lift. AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: Plastic panels — wheel straps or proper lift points only.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
Insert key, press.
Press brake. Move to N.
Hybrid: 12V only.
neutral: Connect jump pack (12V only for Hybrid).
vehicles.notes: Hybrid (Green Line) available. Plastic body panels.
vehicles.warn: Plastic panels. Hybrid: 12V only. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: rear lift. AWD: flatbed preferred.

battery.warnings: Plastic panels. Hybrid: 12V only. AWD: flatbed.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on center console
shift: Find cap near selector base. Pry off.
Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Move to N.
Hybrid (Green Line): 12V only.
vehicles.warn: Plastic body panels — do not chain to body.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from rear (front FWD drive wheels roll).
towNotes: Plastic panels — no hooks on body.

vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock slot near the gear selector base on the console.
Pry off cap. Insert key and press firmly.
Press brake while holding. Move to Neutral.
neutral: 12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
FWD or AWD — AWD: flatbed preferred. FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll.
vehicles.notes: Largest Saturn. Lambda platform (same as Traverse/Enclave). Plastic body panels.
vehicles.warn: Plastic body panels. AWD: flatbed preferred. Heavy for a Saturn.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: rear lift. AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: Plastic panels — no hooks on body.

battery.warnings: Plastic panels. AWD: flatbed. Heavy vehicle.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the small cap near the selector base on the center console.
Pry off cap with a key.
Insert key into slot and press firmly.
While holding, press brake pedal.
Move selector to Neutral.
MANUAL: depress clutch and move gear lever to Neutral.
neutral: Battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift normally.
FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
CRITICAL: Saturn has polymer PLASTIC BODY PANELS — do NOT hook or chain to body panels. Use subframe lift points or flatbed with wheel straps only.
vehicles.notes: Original Saturn compact. Plastic polymer body panels — NO chains on body panels.
vehicles.warn: PLASTIC BODY PANELS — do NOT hook or chain to body. Use subframe/frame lift only or flatbed.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. Flatbed strongly preferred.
towNotes: Plastic panels — no chains on body. Subframe lift or flatbed only.

battery.warnings: Plastic panels — no chains on body panels.

knownIssues.title: Polymer Plastic Body Panels — No Chains
knownIssues.detail: All 1st gen Saturn SL/SC/SW models have polymer plastic body panels. Tow chains or hooks on the body WILL crack or crush the panels. Always use the subframe or proper lift points. Flatbed with wheel straps is the safest method.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (key to Run position — do not start).
Locate the shift lock override: small cap near selector base on center console.
Pry off the plastic cap with your ignition key or a small flathead screwdriver.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
IMPORTANT: plastic body panels — do NOT chain or hook to body panels.
vehicles.notes: Larger Saturn sedan/wagon. Plastic body panels.
vehicles.warn: Plastic body panels — no chains on body.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: Plastic panels — no chains on body.
